title: Pool rooms and turf exchanges; regulations
doc_html:
§4854.  Pool rooms and turf exchanges; regulations

Municipalities of less than five thousand inhabitants may regulate pool rooms and turf exchanges and provide penalties for the violation of ordinances adopted under authority of this Section.
doc_text:
§4854.  Pool rooms and turf exchanges; regulations
Municipalities of less than five thousand inhabitants may regulate pool rooms and turf exchanges and provide penalties for the violation of ordinances adopted under authority of this Section.
